news.headline: Fed governor sees potential benefits of stablecoins; US national debt surpasses $35 trillion, increasing by $500 billion in two weeks.
news.summary: The national debt of the United States has exceeded $35 trillion, with an increase of $500 billion in government debt occurring in just the past two weeks.

news.headline: Montenegro delays Do Kwon's extradition once more as appeal verdict nears.
news.summary: A recent study has indicated that approximately 25% of adults in the United States struggle with credit card debt, with an average balance of $6,194 per person. The research also highlights that 35% of individuals aged 18-29 have credit card debt, while 30% of those aged 30-39 are facing similar financial challenges. Furthermore, the study reveals that nearly 20% of Americans believe they will never be able to pay off their credit card debt. Overall, the findings underscore the widespread issue of credit card debt among Americans, particularly among younger age groups.

news.headline: Super PACs invest $1.3M in media ads for House candidates amidst ongoing early voting, across party lines.
news.summary: The Fairshake and Defend American Jobs Political Action Committees disclosed purchases of advertising space for Republican and Democratic contenders in the House of Representatives, with a combined total of $500,000 allocated for these efforts leading up to the upcoming elections.

news.headline: Rebar plans to debut Bitcoin-native MEV Shield by 2024-end with miners holding significant hashrate. CEO Alex Luce reveals.
news.summary: A significant number of Bitcoin miners are being brought on board by the startup, which represents a large portion of the total hashrate of the Bitcoin network, as stated by Alex Luce.

news.headline: Controversial documentary 'The 1916 Project' exposes Margaret Sanger's ties to eugenics and Planned Parenthood's history.
news.summary: A recently released film and book delve into the racist background of Margaret Sanger, the founder of Planned Parenthood, shedding light on her connections to the eugenics movement. This investigation reveals the harrowing implications of her ideologies in modern times. The unveiling took place in Kansas City, Missouri on October 18, 2024. Notably, the organization behind these revelations is the fastest-growing pro-life group in the country.

news.headline: Parke Bancorp Q3 2024 earnings: Net Income $7.5M (+16.3% Q2 2024), Revenue $33.0M (+5.2% Q2 2024), Assets $2.07B (+2.1% vs. Dec 31, 2023), Loans $1.84B (+2.9% vs. Dec 31, 2023)
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, the net income of the company reached $7.5 million, showing a substantial increase of 16.3% from the previous quarter. The revenue also saw growth, hitting $33.0 million in Q3 2024, a 5.2% rise from Q2 2024. The firm's total assets stood at $2.07 billion, marking a 2.1% increase compared to December 31, 2023. Additionally, total loans increased to $1.84 billion, up by 2.9% from the end of 2023. These positive financial indicators reflect the company's strong performance and growth in key areas.

news.headline: Bank of America declares dividends for Q4 2024 for preferred stock series. Board authorizes cash dividends per share.
news.summary: Bank of America Corporation based in Charlotte, North Carolina, disclosed on October 18, 2024, that its Board of Directors has approved regular cash dividends for various series of preferred stock. The dividend per share for each series was not specified. This move indicates the company's commitment to providing returns to its shareholders who hold these preferred stocks.

news.headline: Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) to distribute $0.015 per unit to holders on Nov 15, 2024, based on oil production from July and gas production from June 2024.
news.summary: Houston-based Permianville Royalty Trust (NYSE: PVL) has disclosed a cash distribution of $0.015000 per unit for its beneficial interest holders. This amount will be payable on November 15, 2024, to those recorded as unitholders by October 31, 2024. The calculation for this distribution is based on reported oil production in July 2024 and natural gas production in June 2024, accounting for accrued costs in August 2024.

news.headline: Scorpio Tankers to release Q3 2024 results on Oct. 29, 2024 with a 9:00 AM EDT conference call. #NYSE:STNG
news.summary: Scorpio Tankers Inc. revealed its upcoming third quarter earnings report release on October 29, 2024. The NYSE-listed company plans to issue the report in the morning EDT and conduct a conference call at 9:00 AM EDT and 2:00 PM CET on the same day.

news.headline: US bank deposits fell to $17.761 tln from $17.83 tln in the prior week.
Public Storage welcomes Chris Sambar as new COO, previously President at AT&T; led 27,000 employees.
news.summary: In Glendale, California, Public Storage (NYSE: PSA) revealed that Chris Sambar has been appointed as the Chief Operating Officer. With a background in leadership roles, Mr. Sambar most recently held the position of President at AT&T Communications, overseeing around 27,000 employees in network operations. Before this, he served in different capacities, such as sales, operations, and corporate strategy, after starting at AT&T.

news.headline: Settlement notice for Walmart stockholders in Delaware court. Plaintiffs vs. Defendants including board members.
news.summary: In a lawsuit filed in the Court of Chancery of Delaware, the Ontario Provincial Council of Carpenters’ Pension Trust Fund, Police & Fire Retirement System of the City of Detroit, and Norfolk County Retirement System have taken legal action derivatively on behalf of Walmart Inc. The plaintiffs have named S. Robson Walton, Gregory B. Penner, Steuart Walton, Timothy P. Flynn, Thomas W. Horton, Marissa A. Mayer, Doug McMillon, Steven S. Reinemund, Phyllis Harris, and Jay Jorgenson as defendants.

news.headline: Seadrill in Hamilton, Bermuda, announces Q3 2024 earnings release and conference call.
news.summary: Bermuda-based Seadrill has revealed its plans for the release of third quarter 2024 earnings, along with a conference call announcement. The company will be sharing financial updates for the mentioned quarter, providing insights into its performance during that period. Interested parties can participate in the conference call to learn more about Seadrill's accomplishments, challenges, and future strategies. This event signifies a critical moment for stakeholders to stay informed about the company's progress. It is yet another step in maintaining transparency and open communication with investors, analysts, and the public.

news.headline: Bank earnings fuel Wall Street to record highs; Oil drops below $70. Gold hits all-time high. Retail sales up. Jobless claims drop. Fed rate cut doubts rise. Mortgage rates spike. Homebuyer activity slows.
news.summary: This week, Wall Street saw significant gains with the S&P 500 and Dow Jones Industrial Average reaching record highs due to better-than-expected bank earnings and positive guidance. The September retail sales report surpassed forecasts, while a considerable decrease in weekly jobless claims further signaled the strength of the U.S. economy. Some economists are now reconsidering their predictions for the Federal Reserve's next actions, questioning the possibility of additional interest rate cuts as the economy shows robust growth. The surge in Treasury yields had an impact on the housing market, causing mortgage rates to surge and mortgage demand to plummet. This shift led to a notable decrease in homebuyers, resulting in a sharp decline in mortgage applications.

news.headline: SEC intensifies case against SOL and other crypto tokens, not backing down as hoped, in ongoing lawsuit with Binance.
news.summary: Recent updates in the SEC's legal action against Binance show that the regulator is intensifying its lawsuit against SOL and other crypto tokens, instead of relenting as anticipated.

news.headline: United Security Bancshares (NASDAQ: UBFO) reports Q3 earnings, nine months ended Sept 30, 2024. Visit UBFO Investor Relations for details.
news.summary: United Security Bancshares, the holding company for United Security Bank, recently disclosed its operating results for the quarter and nine months ended September 30, 2024. The Board of Directors shared this update, and the company can be found on the NASDAQ under the ticker symbol UBFO. To delve into the full release, investors are encouraged to visit UBFO Investor Relations at investors.unitedsecuritybank.com/Q32024-PR. Established in Fresno, California, United Security Bank has been operating since its founding year, serving its customers diligently.

news.headline: Noble Corporation plc will release Q3 2024 results on Nov 5, after the US market close.
news.summary: In Sugar Land, Texas, on October 18, 2024, Noble Corporation plc (CSE: NOBLE, NYSE: NE) revealed its intention to disclose financial updates for the third quarter of 2024 on November 5, 2024, post the closure of the U.S. markets on that day. The Company's upcoming earnings report will provide insights into its performance during this period.

news.headline: Navitas has developed IntelliWeave technology for data centers, achieving 99.3% efficiency and 30% power loss reduction.
news.summary: IntelliWeave's innovative digital control technology, paired with the powerful GaNSafe™ and third-generation Fast SiC MOSFETs, achieves PFC peak efficiencies reaching an outstanding 99.3%. This cutting-edge combination also leads to a significant 30% reduction in power losses when compared to current industry solutions.

news.headline: S&P: Italy 'BBB/A-2' ratings affirmed; outlook stable.
Boston Scientific introduces new cardiac mapping tools for FARAPULSE Pulsed Field Ablation System. New products enhance visualization during ablation.
news.summary: Boston Scientific Corporation revealed their latest innovation on October 18, 2024 - the FARAWAVE™ NAV Ablation Catheter and FARAVIEW™ Software, designed to offer visualization during pulsed field ablation procedures. This technology integrates seamlessly with the OPAL HDx™ Mapping System. The company, listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol BSX, made this announcement from Marlborough, Massachusetts. The development of these products signals a significant advancement in the field of ablation, aiming to enhance accuracy and efficiency during medical procedures.

news.headline: For the week the S&P 500 rose 0.85%, the Nasdaq added 0.8% and the Dow climbed 0.96%.
Zefiro Methane Corp reports commercial progress on investor call, discussing business strategy updates with participants.
news.summary: The senior management team of Zefiro addressed inquiries from investors and shared important information on the Company's latest business strategy enhancements.

news.headline: Editas Medicine will hold a webinar on Oct 22 at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss progress towards 2024 goals, including establishing In Vivo Preclinical Proof of Concept.
news.summary: A virtual seminar is scheduled to take place next Tuesday, October 22nd, starting at 8:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The webinar aims to discuss key topics related to the subject matter and is expected to attract a substantial audience.

news.headline: Capricor Therapeutics closes underwritten public offering, sells 5,073,800 shares, raises $86.3 million.
news.summary: On October 18, 2024, Capricor Therapeutics, a biotechnology company traded on the NASDAQ under the symbol CAPR, completed an underwritten public offering of 5,073,800 shares of its common stock. This figure includes the full exercise of the underwriters’ option to purchase additional shares to cover over-allotments. The total gross proceeds from the offering amounted to around $86.3 million before the deduction of underwriting commissions and other expenses. All the common stock shares, including the over-allotment, were offered by Capricor. The offering closed on the same day.

news.headline: XORTX closes US$1.5M offering & private placement for 810,810 common shares at $1.85 each with warrants at $2.18.
news.summary: XORTX Therapeutics Inc., a late-stage clinical pharmaceutical company focusing on innovative therapies for progressive kidney disease, completed a registered direct offering and private placement on October 18, 2024. The Offering involved the purchase of 810,810 common shares at US$1.85 each (or pre-funded warrants) in the registered direct offering, along with common warrants to buy up to 810,810 common shares at an exercise price of US$2.18 in the private placement. The common warrants are immediately exercisable and valid for five years from the date of issue. This move reflects the Company's strategic financial planning and investment in its future endeavors.

news.headline: Diocese of Orange hosting tour of Our Lady of Guadalupe image, deeply significant to Hispanics. (Characters: 85)
news.summary: The cultural importance of the iconic representation of the Virgin Mary holds great significance for Hispanic communities, often linked to tales of miraculous events. For the Spanish version of this statement, click here. Located in GARDEN GROVE, Calif., news was shared on Oct. 18, 2024, via PRNewswire.

news.headline: Tickets on sale for PlayStation™ The Concert World Tour 2025-2026, starting on April 19th in Dublin, with music from popular games.
news.summary: Tickets for PlayStation™ The Concert are currently available for purchase. This highly anticipated event is scheduled to premiere on April 19, 2025, in Dublin. Attendees can look forward to a cutting-edge live performance showcasing music from popular video game titles such as God of War, The Last of Us, the Horizon franchises, Ghost of Tsushima, and others. After its initial showing in Dublin, the concert will commence a worldwide tour to bring the exhilarating experience to fans across the globe.

news.headline: US Federal Budget Balance Actual 64.26B (Forecast 60B, Previous 380B)
FDA provides updates on increasing access to IV and PD fluids. Efforts continue to improve supply and accessibility.
news.summary: In Silver Spring, Maryland on October 18, 2024, the U.S. Food and Drug Administration released a summary of updates. The FDA is focused on enhancing access to IV and peritoneal dialysis (PD) fluids. This initiative aims to address shortages and improve availability for patients in need. Efforts are underway to boost the supply chain for these vital fluids as part of the ongoing FDA commitment to healthcare.

news.headline: BCB Bancorp (NASDAQ: BCBP) beats Q3 earnings estimate with $0.36 per share, 12.50% surprise. Revenues at $26.17M, surpassing estimates by 3.49%.
news.summary: BCB Bancorp (NASDAQ: BCBP) reported quarterly earnings of $0.36 per share, exceeding the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.32 per share and down from $0.39 per share last year. This marks an earnings surprise of 12.50%. In the previous quarter, the company had an earnings surprise of -53.33%. The company has beaten EPS estimates only once in the last four quarters. Revenues for the quarter ended September 2024 were $26.17 million, surpassing the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 3.49% but lower than the year-ago figure of $27.09 million. The stock's future performance will largely depend on management's earnings call commentary. BCB Bancorp shares belong to the Zacks Banks - Northeast industry. Further details can be read on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Netflix surpasses all Wall St. metrics; strong iPhone demand in China spikes. - Financial news
Tyler Kamp, candidate for Maricopa County Sheriff, talks on KTAR News about his 20-year career in law enforcement.
news.summary: In Phoenix, Tyler Kamp, a candidate for Maricopa County Sheriff, recently appeared on KTAR’s Outspoken to talk about the upcoming election with less than 20 days remaining. During the live radio segment, Kamp delved into his extensive background in law enforcement, highlighting his 20-year career that includes roles such as Shift Commander, Gang Enforcement Sergeant, and Homicide Detective. Additionally, Kamp discussed his global experience, having served as the Director of Investigations and Law Enforcement Development for a non-specified organization.

news.headline: Bromine Market set to grow by USD 860.4 million from 2024-2028, powered by AI insights, mainly driven by oil & gas industry.
news.summary: A recent report utilizing AI technology predicts that the Global Bromine Market will experience significant growth over the period of 2024-2028, with an estimated increase of USD 860.4 million. The market is expected to exhibit a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of nearly 3.5% during this forecasted period.

news.headline: MOC Imbalance
Veterans Department probing Acadia Healthcare for insurance fraud involving patients held without medical cause.
news.summary: Multiple federal agencies are currently probing allegations against a sizable chain of psychiatric hospitals regarding potential incidents of holding patients without valid medical cause.

news.headline: Stock market indices Dow Jones and S&P 500 aim for new record highs, continuing weekly winning streaks.
Campbell Police Department received FAA waiver for 24/7 drone operations as first responders, using Axon technology.
news.summary: The Campbell Police Department has been granted an FAA waiver to utilize DedroneBeyond for drone-agnostic day and night DFR operations without a visual observer. This announcement was made by Axon on October 18, 2024, in Scottsdale, Arizona. Axon (Nasdaq: AXON), a major player in public safety technologies, revealed that this waiver will enable the police department to enhance their operations.

news.headline: LEGO and McLaren Racing bring a full-scale deconstructed LEGO Technic McLaren F1 car to US Grand Prix, Oct 18-20, 2024.
news.summary: Beginning on October 18, 2024, in Austin, Texas, fans will have the opportunity to admire a life-sized deconstructed LEGO Technic® McLaren Formula 1 race car. Attendees can also partake in build activities at the fan area during the event.Both the LEGO Group and McLaren Racing have come together to provide this unique experience to race fans, promising an exclusive and exciting event from October 18 to October 20, 2024.

news.headline: New insurance codes by AMA will improve access to scalp cooling for cancer patients, a milestone for Cooler Heads and hospitals.
news.summary: In San Diego on October 18, 2024, Cooler Heads, a prominent company in scalp cooling technology, commemorates a significant development in healthcare. The American Medical Association (AMA), responsible for establishing Current Procedural Terminology (CPT) codes essential for medical billing, has unveiled a set of new codes.

news.headline: Netflix exceeds all Wall St. metrics.
Subprime crisis-era mortgage making a comeback, with increasing popularity.
3M to report Q3 2024 results; estimates at $1.93 EPS and $6.1B revenue, a 28% and 26.6% decline YoY respectively. Positive earnings history and prediction for an earnings beat this quarter.
news.summary: 3M Company is set to announce its third-quarter 2024 results on October 22. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings is $1.93 per share, up 0.5% in the past 60 days. This reflects a 28% decline from last year. Revenues are estimated at $6.1 billion, down 26.6% year over year. The recent spin-off of the Health Care business may impact the top-line comparison. Despite this, third-quarter performance is expected to benefit from various factors. 3M has a history of surpassing earnings estimates, with an average surprise of 12.6%. The company is expected to beat earnings this quarter as per the Earnings ESP model. This model suggests a positive trend for 3M. It currently holds a Zacks Rank of 3.

news.headline: BTC ETFs reach biggest inflow week since July, $1bn in BlackRock ETF. Venmo now supports crypto through Moonpay. XRP status unaffected by SEC appeal. Worldcoin rebrands to World, EigenLayer X hacked. Hacker of SEC X caught by FBI, stablecoins adopted by SCB in Thailand and DBS in Singapore. Trump family to receive 75% of WLFL revenue, Sybil addresses owned by Scroll team. STX Nakamoto upgrade scheduled for next week.
news.summary: Bitcoin (BTC) exchange-traded funds (ETFs) experienced the highest inflow in a week since July, with BlackRock's ETF alone attracting $1 billion in inflows. Venmo users now have the ability to purchase cryptocurrency through Moonpay. The Security and Exchange Commission's (SEC) appeal regarding XRP does not contest its security classification. Worldcoin is rebranding to World and introducing a new orb. A compromised EigenLayer X account led to an FBI arrest of the hacker. Siam Commercial Bank (SCB) in Thailand is incorporating stablecoins for transfers, while DBS Bank in Singapore is enlisting 'token services.' The Trump family is set to receive 75% of WLFL revenue. The Scroll team is under scrutiny for owning sybil addresses. An upgrade to the STX Nakamoto is scheduled for next week.

news.headline: Oriental Rise Holding Limited closes IPO, offering 1.75M shares at $4 per share on NasdaqCM under ticker symbol “ORIS”.
news.summary: In Ningde, China, on October 18, 2024, Oriental Rise Holding Limited disclosed the completion of its initial public offering (IPO) with a total of 1,750,000 ordinary shares sold at a price of $4 per share. The company, known for being a leading supplier of tea products in mainland China, started trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market the day prior, on October 17, 2024, under the ticker symbol "ORIS" (NasdaqCM: ORIS).

news.headline: CFTC Positions Week Ended October 15th
Nvidia stock predicted to reach $190, analyst cites "generational opportunity" with 40% upside potential. Earnings estimates boosted by 13-20%.
news.summary: Bank of America has designated Nvidia Corp. (NASDAQ:NVDA) as its top stock pick in the artificial intelligence (AI) sector, referring to the company as a "generational opportunity." The investment bank has upped its price target for Nvidia from $165 to $190, indicating a 40% potential upside from current market prices. Analyst Vivek Arya, recognizing Nvidia's dominance in AI chips and its future growth prospects, has increased the company's earnings estimates for 2025 and 2026 by 13% to 20%. Arya pointed out Nvidia's 80-85% market control in the AI industry, anticipating a total addressable market (TAM) exceeding $400 billion by 2024, a fourfold increase from previous estimates. This positive outlook is backed by recent developments within the industry.

news.headline: LG&E and KU predict load growth with data centers & economic development. Kentucky's economic boost leads to an increase in load.
news.summary: A recent IRP filing by utilities in Louisville, Kentucky on October 18, 2024, tackles the challenge of an increased load resulting from the significant economic growth in the state. This growth, particularly driven by the establishment of data centers and other economic development activities, has been robust. The filing encompasses various scenarios and strategies to address this surge in demand, reflecting the changing landscape of the state. Kentucky has experienced remarkable economic progress, with certain sectors witnessing notable expansion including data centers, driving up the energy needs. The utilities' proactive approach in their IRP filing demonstrates a readiness to adapt to the escalating demand for energy in the region.

news.headline: Nokia Corp buys back own shares on October 18, 2024.

Cryptocurrency prices surge as BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF amasses $1 billion. Notable stats: 98% Bitcoin holders profit, 3% break even. 37,689 traders liquidated in 24 hrs, totaling $113.04 million. Bitcoin dominance hits 65% (3-yr high). Worldcoin rebrands as 'World' and launches blockchain.
news.summary: The cryptocurrency market is on the rise with BlackRock's Bitcoin ETF amassing $1 billion in BTC. Bitcoin is priced at $68,954.45 with a 2.9% gain, while Ethereum is at $2,665.94 (+2.9%). Other notable increases include Solana (+5%), Dogecoin (+14.2%), and Shiba Inu (+6.6%). Notable stats include a 16.4% decrease in large transactions but a 19.9% growth in daily active addresses. Over 37,000 traders were liquidated in 24 hours, totaling $113.04 million in losses. With Bitcoin holders seeing profits, a supply shock is predicted as the exchange reserves hit all-time lows. Additionally, Bitcoin dominance has crossed 65% for the first time since early 2021. Worldcoin is rebranding to 'World' and launching its blockchain.

news.headline: Micron Technology stock receives RS Rating upgrade due to improving price performance. Details in Investor's Business Daily.
news.summary: Micron Technology has seen a boost in price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The tech company's stock has shown improvement, resulting in a positive shift in its rating. This upgrade reflects Micron Technology's strong performance in the market.
